title: Wisconsin Lawmakers Introduce SAF Tax Credit Legislation
content: â€‹Wisconsin legislators have introduced a tax credit to promote sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) production in the state. The proposed legislation offers producers a $1.50 per gallon tax credit for SAF produced in Wisconsin, taking effect in 2028. 90% of the fuel would need to come from renewable sources and crops grown in the United States.
author: Analysts Account
